testsuite.name: Network Layer Integration

testcase.name: should aggregate health status from all components
should discover and transfer blob between two nodes
should track peer events across unified network

testsuite.system-out: 02:30:24.766 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: QXLm9zNNZnRYSCnPFVfTtw==, expected response: zzGBVQUk9e2estS6Cy7gDT4cP+E= 02:30:24.802 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.maxCapacityPerThread: 4096 02:30:24.803 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.ratio: 8 02:30:24.803 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.chunkSize: 32 02:30:24.803 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.blocking: false 02:30:24.803 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.batchFastThreadLocalOnly: true 02:30:24.928 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0xe53b5bf4, L:/127.0.0.1:63650 - R:/127.0.0.1:63666] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 02:30:24.930 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: QXLm9zNNZnRYSCnPFVfTtw==, response: zzGBVQUk9e2estS6Cy7gDT4cP+E= Connecting to: ws://127.0.0.1:63808 02:30:37.609 [nioEventLoopGroup-51-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: vl2nwdQd3Q+WmWBgEXj1MQ==, expected response: 88NnCpHEC95jKBgFLzEc7yuaVWI= 02:30:37.622 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0x82a70959, L:/127.0.0.1:63808 - R:/127.0.0.1:63812] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 02:30:37.624 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: vl2nwdQd3Q+WmWBgEXj1MQ==, response: 88NnCpHEC95jKBgFLzEc7yuaVWI= Connection successful
